name: Search
description: Search and browse snippets with text queries, filters, and pagination.

endpoints.description: Search snippets by query with optional filters. Returns a canonical page envelope of snippet summaries.

params.name: q
params.description: Full-text search query. Supports operators: tag:, tags:, lang:, language:, user:, submitter:, by:, generated:

params.name: tags
params.description: Comma-separated tag filter. Prefix with ! to exclude.

params.name: languages
params.description: Comma-separated language filter. Prefix with ! to exclude.

params.name: submitter
params.description: Filter by submitter. Use 'me' for current user.

endpoints.description: Fetch multiple snippets by their IDs.

response_fields.name: (shape)
response_fields.description: Each element is a snippet summary: `id`, `title`, `language`, `summary`, `tags`, vote and bookmark counts, `meta`, and optional `relevance`.

endpoints.description: Fetch the authenticated user's snippets.
Get the JSON Schema for snippet submission. Use it to validate payloads before submitting.

response_fields.name: (schema)
response_fields.description: JSON Schema describing valid snippet payloads for submission (matches what the API enforces on create/update).

name: Snippets
description: Create, update, delete, vote on, and generate snippets. Includes versioning, diffing, and metrics.

endpoints.description: Fetch a single snippet by ID. Returns full detail or null.

response_fields.name: (shape)
response_fields.description: Full snippet document, or `null` if missing or not visible.

endpoints.description: Overview search inside rendered snippet records. Returns section previews for files, symbols, and text using the active snippet parameter values.

params.name: params
params.description: JSON-encoded object carrying snippet parameter values for the rendered search context.

params.name: q
params.description: Query text. Empty query returns browse-style overview content.

params.name: whole
params.description: Truthy value (`1`, `true`, `yes`, `on`) enables whole-word text matching.

response_fields.name: summary
response_fields.description: Counts for matching files, unique symbols, text matches, and symbol kinds.

response_fields.name: sections
response_fields.description: Overview sections with preview items and `hasMore` for `See all`.

endpoints.description: Paged category search inside rendered snippet records. Use this for `files`, `text`, or symbol-kind browsing with the active snippet parameter values.

params.name: params
params.description: JSON-encoded object carrying snippet parameter values for the rendered search context.

params.name: q
params.description: Query text for filtering the category.

params.name: whole
params.description: Truthy value (`1`, `true`, `yes`, `on`) enables whole-word text matching.

response_fields.name: summary
response_fields.description: Counts for matching files, unique symbols, text matches, and symbol kinds.

response_fields.name: detail
response_fields.description: Paged detail results for the requested category.

endpoints.description: Paged exact-symbol drilldown inside rendered snippet records. Returns symbol metadata plus the requested definitions, calls, or references tab.

params.name: params
params.description: JSON-encoded object carrying snippet parameter values for the rendered search context.

response_fields.name: summary
response_fields.description: Counts for matching files, unique symbols, text matches, and symbol kinds.

response_fields.name: detail
response_fields.description: Paged drilldown results for the requested symbol tab.

response_fields.name: symbol
response_fields.description: Exact-symbol metadata with counts for definitions, calls, references, and kinds.

endpoints.description: Create or update a snippet. Include an existing ID to update. Validates against /api/schema.
Apply a JSON Patch (RFC 6902) to a snippet. Requires ownership of the snippet.

params.name: patch
params.description: JSON Patch operations to apply to the stored snippet document.

params.name: changeReason
params.description: Short note stored on the new version (max 500 chars).

params.name: baseVersion
params.description: Must match current `version` or the server returns 400.

response_fields.name: id
response_fields.description: Snippet ID (may be omitted when unchanged in edge cases).

response_fields.name: version
response_fields.description: New snippet version number after applying the patch.

endpoints.description: Soft-delete a snippet. Requires ownership of the snippet.
Set the current user's vote on a snippet.

response_fields.name: userUpvoted
response_fields.description: Whether the current user has an upvote on this target.

response_fields.name: userDownvoted
response_fields.description: Whether the current user has a downvote on this target.

endpoints.description: Set whether the current user saved a snippet in the built-in Saved list.

response_fields.name: userBookmarked
response_fields.description: Whether the current user bookmarked the snippet.

endpoints.description: AI-assisted snippet editing. Returns an SSE stream with progress, message, tool_call, tool_result, complete, error, and done event types.

params.name: snippet
params.description: Current snippet JSON to inspect or mutate.

params.name: message
params.example: Turn this into a Docker Compose snippet with comments

params.name: history
params.description: Prior assistant conversation turns as {role, content} objects.

response_fields.name: stream
response_fields.description: Server-Sent Events: lines `data: {json}` with `type` such as `progress`, `message`, `tool_call`, `tool_result`, `complete` (includes `snippet`), `error`, then `done`.

example.request_body: {"snippet":{"title":"Compose starter","records":[{"type":"code","name":"docker-compose.yml","payload":"services:\n  web:\n    image: nginx"}]},"message":"Turn this into a Docker Compose snippet with comments","history":[{"role":"user","content":"Start with nginx only"}]}

endpoints.description: Render Markdown to HTML server-side.

response_fields.name: (body)
response_fields.description: Rendered HTML (response body, not JSON). `Content-Type: text/html`.

endpoints.description: List version history for a snippet.
Get the diff between two snippet versions.

response_fields.name: changedFields
response_fields.description: Dot-path strings for changed top-level fields.

response_fields.name: recordChanges
response_fields.description: Per-record file index and changed field names.

endpoints.description: Preview what a submit would change, without actually saving.

params.name: after
params.description: Proposed snippet JSON after edits (same general shape as a stored snippet).

params.name: ignorePaths
params.description: JSON Pointer paths to strip before diffing (defaults apply if omitted).

response_fields.name: displayTitle
response_fields.description: Title shown in the diff UI.

response_fields.name: summaryChips
response_fields.description: Short labels summarizing the change set.

response_fields.name: groups
response_fields.description: Nested groups/sections with unified and split diff lines for the browser.

endpoints.description: Get upvote, downvote, and Saved-list bookmark counts for a snippet.

name: Comments
description: Create, vote on, edit, and delete comments on snippets.

endpoints.description: Create a comment on a snippet, optionally as a reply.
Set the current user's vote on a comment.

response_fields.name: userUpvoted
response_fields.description: Whether the current user has an upvote on this target.

response_fields.name: userDownvoted
response_fields.description: Whether the current user has a downvote on this target.

endpoints.description: Delete a comment. Requires you to be the comment author.
Edit an existing comment's text.

name: Authentication
description: Session management, OAuth login, passkeys, API keys, and account operations.

endpoints.description: Start CLI device authorization. Returns device and user codes plus a verification URL.

response_fields.name: deviceCode
response_fields.description: Opaque device code for polling the token endpoint.

response_fields.name: userCode
response_fields.description: Short code for the browser approval step.

response_fields.name: verificationUri
response_fields.description: Browser URL where the user approves the device.

response_fields.name: verificationUriComplete
response_fields.description: Verification URL prefilled with the user code.

response_fields.name: expiresAt
response_fields.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the challenge expires.

endpoints.description: Approve or deny a device code from a signed-in browser session.

params.name: userCode
params.description: Short code shown to the CLI.

params.name: approve
params.description: Approve when true, deny when false. Defaults to true.

response_fields.name: approved
response_fields.description: Whether the device flow was approved.

endpoints.description: Poll for device authorization completion. Returns `authorization_pending`, `slow_down`, `expired`, or an API key for `x-api-key` authentication.

response_fields.name: apiKey
response_fields.description: API key to send in the `x-api-key` header after approval.

endpoints.description: Get the current user's profile. Returns null when no authenticated session cookie or API key is present.

response_fields.name: (shape)
response_fields.description: Signed-in user profile: `id`, linked `oauthProviders`, `username`, `avatarUrl`, sets of upvoted/downvoted snippet IDs, `role`, `privacy`, and related fields. Does not include API key secrets. `null` if not authenticated.

endpoints.description: List available OAuth login providers (GitHub, Google, GitLab).
Log out the current browser session. API-key callers succeed without revoking the key or removing sessions.
Delete the authenticated user's account and all data. Irreversible.
Unlink an OAuth provider from the current account.
Update the authenticated user's username. Usernames are trimmed, normalized to lowercase, globally unique, and may contain only letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores.
Update the authenticated user's bio.
Update how the authenticated user's public profile is exposed.

params.name: show
params.description: Nested show settings for the public profile.

params.name: defaultListVisibility
params.description: Default visibility for new lists: 'public' or 'unlisted'.

endpoints.description: List the authenticated user's custom `@username/...` routes for owned snippets and lists.
Create or update a custom `@username/...` route for one owned snippet or list. Replaces any existing route for the same target and rejects path collisions within the account.

params.name: targetId
params.description: Owned snippet or list to route.

params.name: path
params.description: Slash-separated alias path stored without a leading slash.

endpoints.description: Delete the custom route for an owned snippet or list.

params.name: targetId
params.description: Target whose route should be removed.

endpoints.description: List the user's active browser sessions. API-key callers still receive the list, with `current: false` on every entry.

response_fields.name: (shape)
response_fields.description: Page envelope containing session views in `items` plus `total`, `offset`, and `limit`.

endpoints.description: Disconnect other active sessions. With API-key auth only, this removes all authenticated sessions for the user.
Disconnect a specific active browser session owned by the current user. Deleting the current session also clears the browser session cookie.
List API keys owned by the current user.
Generate a new API key and return it once.

response_fields.name: item
response_fields.description: Created API key metadata with `id` and `createdAt`.

endpoints.description: Revoke one API key owned by the current user.

name: Lists
description: Create, read, update, and delete curated lists of snippets.

endpoints.description: Get the authenticated user's lists, including built-in lists such as Saved.
Create a new list. If `unlisted` is omitted, the account's privacy default applies.

params.name: unlisted
params.description: Whether the list is unlisted (defaults to the account privacy setting).

endpoints.description: Get public and owner-visible custom lists for a given user. Excludes built-in lists.
Get details for a specific list.
Update a list's title, description, or visibility.
Delete a list.
Add a snippet to a list.
Remove a snippet from a list.

name: Requests
description: Submit and manage snippet requests from the community.

endpoints.description: Submit a new snippet request.
List snippet requests with optional filters using the canonical page envelope.

response_fields.name: (shape)
response_fields.description: Page envelope of snippet request objects.

endpoints.description: Get a single snippet request by ID.
Delete a snippet request. Requires you to be the request author.
Update the status of a snippet request.
Mark a request as fulfilled by linking a snippet.

params.name: snippetId
params.description: Snippet ID that fulfills this request.

endpoints.description: Health check endpoint. Returns service status.
Report a snippet, user, or comment.
Submit product or site feedback.
